name: Pecan Soup
recipeInstructions:
This is a wonderful fall soup, and only 200 calories per serving.
Preheat oven to 350°F. On a baking sheet, toast the pecans for 10-to-15 minutes, checking occasionally to prevent burning. Toss occasionally.
In a food processor, place the pecans, garlic, and about 1/2 cup of the stock. Turn on the processor and add stock until you have a creamy consistency. (The mixture will absorb the stock.) Pass the pecan-stock mixture through a sieve into a saucepan and bring to a boil. Add the cream, season to taste with salt and pepper, and serve.
